sections.title: When using the right-click pay option

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: There are some crazy things down there, I don't think you're capable so I'll let you keep your Numulites.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: It doesn't look like you have 30 Numulites with you unfortunately.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Thanks [player name]. That will grant you access to the mine. You're a crazy one.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: You've already paid up! You can head right on in. Better you than me...

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Sorry, I'll need paying before I can return your stuff.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Sorry, I'll need paying before I can return your stuff.

sections.title: When using the right-click retrieve option

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Sorry, I've got nothing for you. I'm not sure what you'd have been doing in there anyway, since I wouldn't expect to let you in.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Sorry, I've got nothing for you. If I had some of your stuff earlier, but you died before collecting it, it'd be lost.

sections.title: When trying to enter the Volcanic Mine

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Sorry [player name], you won't last a minute in there. You got to prove yourself as a capable archeologist, and be good at the minin'.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: It doesn't look like you have 30 Numulites with you unfortunately.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Sorry [player name] I can't let people head in mid way through a mine out session. It's not safe and will cause mine collapse!

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Sorry [player name], I cannot allow someone to go in there without paying first. Come see me.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Sorry [player name] I can't let people head in mid way through a mine out session. It's not safe and will cause mine collapse!

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: You should probably pick up the stuff you left in there earlier before you return. Come and see me.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Well why am I going to reward you for that?! Might wanna contribute next time. I am not standin' out here for nothin'.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: I'll give you a bit of minin' trainin' and I'll remember the contribution you've made.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: I'll quickly take those fragments off your hands [player name], thank you! I'll give you a bit of minin' trainin' and I'll remember the contribution you've made.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there Pete.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Argh! Who be there?

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Oh, it's just the adventurer, phew! Things can be scary around here, I've seen some weeeeeiiiird stuff in that cavern.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is in the cavern?

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Oh no, now I'm thinking about it again! *screams*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay okay, calm down! Why are you guarding it? What is the purpose of this cavern?

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: It's a mine. It's special but dangerous, things move around and the mine could collapse at any moment!.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: I'd say you'll need at least level 50 Mining to be capable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not quite up to scratch then...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well sounds like I am capable then!

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: The main idea is to chip down the big boulders, in order to find the fragments inside. Deliver them to me and I'll show you some minin' tips to help you get better at it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I traverse the mine? Isn't it full of lava?

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: I have a handy supply of heat-proof water containers. I'll give them out to anyone going in with bit of water inside. They only hold so much though.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: I reckon you could harden the lava with it! Just throw a bit of water on it. Make yourself a path, but be careful, they won't last forever.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything else?

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Uh oh, there is one more thing, but it hurts. My backside has never felt the same since, one of the reasons I don't dare go in there anymore. There are some gas holes around, just feel 'em.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I keep the mine stable?

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Don't let it collapse!! It's petrifying, it will stick with you forever. The rumbles create a flashback in my mind, arghhh.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: There are some vents and chambers in there. Do better than I did with them, you want around a 50% gas level in each chamber.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: There are 3 in total, we spent awhile coming up with names, such as 'Vent west of the pillar near the entrance on the left hand side', but decided A, B and C would be easier.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Presumably, a western chamber, central chamber and eastern chamber?

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Yep! That's right. Block the chamber to let gas build up, unblock 'em to let gas out. Any creatures in there will cause instability too.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Oh, also, if you have more than one rock to mine, keep them going at roughly the same pace too. Everything gets a bit wobbly if you proceed too quickly down one channel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Explain the dangers for me.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: It is bad, very bad in there. If you're not prepared, you will be done for. Wouldn't catch me in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, so how do I prepare?

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Look out for the Lava beasts, they'll throw projectiles at anyone they see. You'll have stalacmites falling on you, fire jumping out the lava towards you. Seriously, you're insane.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I'll keep that in mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go inside?

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: There are some crazy things down there, I don't think you're capable.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Well luckily for you, or rather, unlucky for you, I'll let you go inside as you've definitely got the mining skills.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: I'll have to charge you though - upkeep of this place ain't cheap and cheerful. I'll need 30 Numulites for one visit or 3,000 for unlimited trips.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have 30 Numulites with me unfortunately.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Thanks [player name]. That will grant you access to the mine. You're a crazy one.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Thanks [player name]. That will grant you permanent access to the mine. You're a crazy one.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: You've already paid the entrance fee too, so you can head right on in.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: I've got some of your stuff that you left here earlier. You'd better deal with it before trying to go into the cavern again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you anything to trade?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you picked up anything I left in the mine?

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Sorry, I've got nothing for you. I'm not sure what you'd have been doing in there anyway, since I wouldn't expect to let you in.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Sorry, I've got nothing for you. If I had some of your stuff earlier, but you died before collecting it, it'd be lost.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you be.

sections.title: Overhead dialogue when a player starts a game

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: [player name] has started up a mine! Join [him/her/them] down there now!

sections.title: Using a dragon pickaxe (broken) on Pete

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Pete, I found this in one of my ore packs...

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Woah, what is that you've got there?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's... a pickaxe, a broken one.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: That's not just any broken pickaxe, it's a dragon one! They're really rare!

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: I have no idea how that ended up in your ore pack, but you can keep it, it's broken anyway.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Maybe you can find someone to help you repair it! I've heard tales that some dwarves used to fix pickaxes.

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: One of them was called Nurmof. I think he used to reside in the Falador mines. If you're lucky, he could still be there.

sections.title: After buying the large water container

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Nice one [player name]! In future I'll give you twice as much water when you go into the mine!

sections.title: When attempting to climb down the volcano entrance on a Deadman Mode world

lines.speaker: Petrified Pete
lines.text: Sorry [player name], this a Deadman world. People are fighting all over the shop. No one gets in the mine here!
